name: SKY130 20-bit Sigma-Delta ADC v2
description: Complete redesign from SAR to sigma-delta. Oversampling + noise shaping gives 20-bit ENOB at 4 kSPS on 130nm.
margin_rule: Every spec must pass with >= 25% margin

enob.description: Effective number of bits. 18 minimum, 20 target. From SINAD at near-Nyquist input.

power_uw.description: Total power including modulator + decimation filter
